name: Faded colors
description:
Smicker Tittynope used to be a regular clown, until he fell in love with a girl who got... Sick.

Smick poured his magic out for her every day at the hospital. Flowers. Butterflies. Bubbles and birds.

A clown's magic comes from their happy hearts. As Smicker's beloved grew weaker, so did his heart, and so did his magic.

He put on a brave face and stayed smiling for her, and then one day... she was gone.

Unable to hold back his tears and colors completely faded, he broke from the clown troupe. Will Smicker ever learn to smile for love again?

CW: Sickness, grief, loss, death, angst... And clowns. 🤡
creator: D1ngusD0ngus
